title: 30-second test declared comprehensive — misses GC, pool exhaustion, leaks
violated_rule: Steady state duration sufficient — >= 1 min smoke, >= 3 min load/stress
expected_feedback: Critical: 30-second steady state is insufficient for a load test. Misses GC major collections (every 2-3 min), connection pool exhaustion, memory leaks. Minimum 3-5 minutes for standard load tests, 15+ minutes for soak. This is a smoke test at best.
